title: ardisia dressleri
intro: Ardisia dressleri is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, thanks to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ardisia dressleri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Ardisia dressleri typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams for various health applications.
